response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI-native fintech teams, deep regulatory fintech infrastructure experience, and proven production-scale multi-agent AI systems — critical for this executive role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with event-driven architectures and agentic workflows (MCP frameworks)
Proven ability to build and ship complex systems across languages (DLang, TS, Node.js)
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching, indicating strong communication and craftsmanship
concerns: No clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments with financial consequences
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No demonstrated architecture of real-time credit risk, working-capital, or trade decisioning AI systems
